nasb.text: who by the Holy Spirit, through the mouth of our father David Your servant, said, ‘Why did the  Gentiles rage, And the peoples devise futile things?

esv.text: who through the mouth of our father David, your servant, said by the Holy Spirit, “‘Why did the Gentiles rage, and the peoples plot in vain?

cnv.text: 你曾以聖靈藉著你僕人我們祖先大衛的口說： ‘列國為甚麼騷動？ 萬民為甚麼空謀妄想？

ccb.text: 你借着圣灵感动你的仆人——我们的祖先大卫说， “‘列国为何咆哮？ 万民为何枉费心机？

csbs.text: 你曾经藉着圣灵，用你的仆人——我们先祖大卫的口说： ‘列国为什么狂怒骚乱， 众民为什么图谋虚空？
